subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Herald raiseth his call from every direction: "O concourse of humanity! By God, the Lord of Destiny hath come!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینادی المناد من کل الجهات یا معشر البشر تالله قد اتی مالک القدر
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
